title: Adapt dispatcher to 0.1.26: cells.update registry entry + handler, re-sync copied status logic with review-block bee_status.mjs
action: Per DA3 (decision 30606de4), bring the imported dispatcher up to bee 0.1.26 without touching the 4 legacy helpers. (1) command-registry.mjs: add a cells.update entry mirroring bee_cells.mjs's update verb contract exactly (invoke 'bee cells update'; parameters: id required string; file string; stdin boolean; json boolean; description states the door: only open|blocked cells, allowlist plan fields, frozen keys id/feature/status/trace/tier and unknown keys refuse the whole patch; a runnable example following the suite's existing example conventions). (2) bee.mjs: import updateCell from './lib/cells.mjs'; add handleCellsUpdate replicating bee_cells.mjs case 'update' output byte-for-byte (success text `Updated <id> (<patched keys joined by, >).`, result = the updated cell, same --file/--stdin handling and JSON-parse error text); register as 'cells.update' in HANDLERS. --stdin already sits in FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS. (3) Re-sync the copied status layer in bee.mjs against CURRENT .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs: bring over buildReviewBlock (imports listCandidates, listReviews, deriveCandidateStatus from './lib/reviews.mjs'), POST_EXECUTION_REVIEW_PHASES, and the current buildStatus/renderStatusText bodies, so `bee status` and `bee status --json` stdout are byte-identical to the helper's on the same repo (stderr drift hints excluded from parity). Preserve the PR's P1 rule: drift signal only ever reaches stderr, never stdout. (4) test_bee_cli.mjs: extend to cover cells.update (registry example executes green) and add/keep a status parity assertion (dispatcher stdout diffed against helper stdout, text and --json). (5) Mirror every touched templates file byte-identical into .bee/bin/.

truths: `bee cells update` on an open fixture cell patches allowed fields and refuses frozen/unknown keys with the same exit code and message as bee_cells.mjs update
`node .bee/bin/bee.mjs status` and `--json` stdout are byte-identical to `node .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs` (and --json) on this repo at verify time

registry names now form exactly {status} + cells.{list,ready,show,add,update,claim,verify,cap,block,drop,tier,judge} + reservations.{reserve,release,list,sweep} + decisions.{log,supersede,redact,active,search}
key_links: decision «cells-update-verb shipped» 2026-07-12 (update is the only sanctioned cell-revision path)
prohibitions: bee_status.mjs, bee_cells.mjs, bee_reservations.mjs, bee_decisions.mjs are not modified (vantt D5)
no drift/manifest signal on stdout (PR P1 rule preserved)
no new helper groups beyond the 4 legacy ones (DA6)

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && bash -c 'diff <(node .bee/bin/bee.mjs status 2>/dev/null) <(node .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs 2>/dev/null)' && bash -c 'diff <(node .bee/bin/bee.mjs status --json 2>/dev/null) <(node .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs --json 2>/dev/null)' && cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs .bee/bin/bee.mjs && cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/command-registry.mjs .bee/bin/lib/command-registry.mjs

trace.outcome: Adapted the imported bee.mjs dispatcher to 0.1.26: added cells.update (registry entry + handler, wired to lib/cells.mjs's updateCell), and re-synced buildStatus/renderStatusText against current bee_status.mjs (added buildReviewBlock/POST_EXECUTION_REVIEW_PHASES/hasStaleAdvisorKey staleness check, removed the stale advisor field and gate-review staleness check) so bee status/--json are byte-identical to the helper. Mirrored both templates files into .bee/bin.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs (existing 66 checks: registry shape, validate-args, demo-1/demo-2 dispatcher chains, status --json parity, drift/manifest handling)"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "registry-covers-subcommands expected list now includes cells.update",
    "new check: cells.update example runs through the real dispatcher (demo-1 chain, patches title on an open cell)",
    "new check: bee status (text form) is byte-identical to bee_status.mjs (text form) (D5 parity) — previously only --json was asserted",
    "new check: bee cells update patches an allowed field on the open demo-2 fixture, through the dispatcher",
    "new check: bee cells update refuses a frozen key (status) with the same exit code and stderr as bee_cells.mjs update (D5 parity)"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Reconstructed the pre-change bee.mjs + command-registry.mjs from git HEAD (the hia-1 import, pre-adaptation) and re-ran the same two probes against the CURRENT .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs/bee_cells.mjs: (1) `node before/bee.mjs cells update --id demo --file /dev/null` -> exit 1, `Unknown command \"cells.update\". Did you mean \"cells.judge\"?` (cells.update did not exist in the dispatcher at all). (2) `diff <(node before/bee.mjs status --json) <(node .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs --json)` -> non-empty diff, exit 1: the old copy's JSON was missing the entire `review` block (buildReviewBlock/listCandidates/listReviews/deriveCandidateStatus were never ported) that bee_status.mjs's current buildStatus emits — a real parity break, not a hypothetical one. Separately, source inspection showed the old copy also carried a stray `advisor` key in buildStatus's return object and a `POST_REVIEW_PHASES`/gate-review staleness check that bee_status.mjs no longer has (both silently removed upstream), plus a missing `hasStaleAdvisorKey` staleness check — divergences invisible in this repo's current text-mode output only because no candidate is currently high-risk-unreviewed and no advisor key is configured, but real drift all the same, confirmed by direct side-by-side reading of both buildStatus/renderText bodies.",
  "verification_run": "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs -> 71 passed, 0 failed. diff <(node .bee/bin/bee.mjs status) <(node .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs) -> exit 0 (byte-identical). diff <(node .bee/bin/bee.mjs status --json) <(node .bee/bin/bee_status.mjs --json) -> exit 0 (byte-identical). cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs .bee/bin/bee.mjs -> exit 0. cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/command-registry.mjs .bee/bin/lib/command-registry.mjs -> exit 0. Full recorded output in the cell trace (verify_output)."
}
